raw.message: Super addictive block puzzle game! Bet you won’t be able to stop playing!

hook.summary: A hand uses a stylus to fill a plane-shaped grid with blue blocks, framed as an IQ test.
hook.visual_action: Stylus dragging blue polyomino blocks into a plane silhouette.
hook.text_overlay: Fill up the plane for IQ 120+

scene_flow: A hand begins placing blue blocks into a plane-shaped grid.
The IQ counter increments as more pieces are successfully placed.
The player fails to fit the final pieces, resulting in a large red 'FAIL' stamp.
The ad ends with the game logo 'Blockudoku' and a small disclaimer.
on_screen_text: Fill up the plane for IQ 120+
This feature is not included in the actual gameplay yet. The game is not an actual IQ test.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who enjoy brain-training challenges and IQ-based competition.
